description.content: Access market data, manage accounts, and trade on Binance Spot.

exec: // only sign if a signature param was declared and we have a secret
const cryptoKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', keyData, { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const signatureBuffer = await crypto.subtle.sign('HMAC', cryptoKey, msgData);
if (Array.isArray(value) || (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null)) return JSON.stringify(value);
if (str === null || str === undefined) return true;

item.name: Cancel All Open Orders on a Symbol (TRADE)

query.description: Supports up to three decimal places of precision (e.g., 6000.346) so that microseconds may be specified.
UTC timestamp in ms
Signature
Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.

Supported values:
`ONLY_NEW` - Cancel will succeed if the order status is `NEW`.
`ONLY_PARTIALLY_FILLED` - Cancel will succeed if order status is `PARTIALLY_FILLED`.
Supports up to three decimal places of precision (e.g., 6000.346) so that microseconds may be specified.
UTC timestamp in ms
Signature
Please see [Enums](/products/spot/enums#side) for supported values.
Please see [Enums](/products/spot/enums#ordertypes) for supported values.
Please see [Enums](/products/spot/enums#timeinforce) for supported values.

A unique id among open orders. Automatically generated if not sent.
Orders with the same `newClientOrderID` can be accepted only when the previous one is filled, otherwise the order will be rejected.
The value cannot be less than `1000000`.
Used with `STOP_LOSS`, `STOP_LOSS_LIMIT`, `TAKE_PROFIT`, and `TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT` orders.
See Trailing Stop order FAQ
Used with `LIMIT`, `STOP_LOSS_LIMIT`, and `TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT` to create an iceberg order.
`MARKET` and `LIMIT` order types default to `FULL`, all other orders default to `ACK`.
The allowed enums is dependent on what is configured on the symbol.
See Pegged Orders Info
Price level to peg the price to (max: 100). See Pegged Orders Info
Only `PRICE_LEVEL` is supported. See Pegged Orders Info
Supports up to three decimal places of precision (e.g., 6000.346) so that microseconds may be specified.
UTC timestamp in ms
Signature
`orderId` or `origClientOrderId` must be sent
`orderId` or `origClientOrderId` must be sent

The new client order ID for the order after being amended.
If not sent, one will be randomly generated.
It is possible to reuse the current clientOrderId by sending it as the `newClientOrderId`.
`newQty` must be greater than 0 and less than the order's quantity.

The value cannot be greater than `60000`.
Supports up to three decimal places of precision (e.g., 6000.346) so that microseconds may be specified.
UTC timestamp in ms
Signature

item.name: Cancel an Existing Order and Send a New Order (TRADE)

query.description:
The allowed values are:
`STOP_ON_FAILURE` - If the cancel request fails, the new order placement will not be attempted.
`ALLOW_FAILURE` - new order placement will be attempted even if cancel request fails.
Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.

Either `cancelOrderId` or `cancelOrigClientOrderId` must be sent.

If both `cancelOrderId` and `cancelOrigClientOrderId` parameters are provided, the `cancelOrderId` is searched first, then the `cancelOrigClientOrderId` from that result is checked against that order.

If both conditions are not met the request will be rejected.

Either `cancelOrderId` or `cancelOrigClientOrderId` must be sent.

If both `cancelOrderId` and `cancelOrigClientOrderId` parameters are provided, the `cancelOrderId` is searched first, then the `cancelOrigClientOrderId` from that result is checked against that order.

If both conditions are not met the request will be rejected.
Used to identify the new order.
The value cannot be less than `1000000`.
See [Trailing Stop order FAQ](/products/spot/faqs/trailing-stop-faq)

Allowed values:
`ACK`, `RESULT`, `FULL`
`MARKET` and `LIMIT` orders types default to `FULL`; all other orders default to `ACK`
The allowed enums is dependent on what is configured on the symbol. The possible supported values are: [STP Modes](/products/spot/enums#stpmodes).

Supported values:
`ONLY_NEW` - Cancel will succeed if the order status is `NEW`.
`ONLY_PARTIALLY_FILLED ` - Cancel will succeed if order status is `PARTIALLY_FILLED`.

Supported values:
`DO_NOTHING` (default)- will only attempt to cancel the order if account has not exceeded the unfilled order rate limit
`CANCEL_ONLY` - will always cancel the order

`PRIMARY_PEG` or `MARKET_PEG`
See Pegged Orders

Price level to peg the price to (max: 100)
See Pegged Orders

Only `PRICE_LEVEL` is supported
See Pegged Orders.
Supports up to three decimal places of precision (e.g., 6000.346) so that microseconds may be specified.
UTC timestamp in ms
Signature

Either `symbol` or `symbols` must be provided

Units cannot be combined (e.g. `1d2h` is not allowed).

Parameter symbol and symbols cannot be used in combination. If neither parameter is sent, `bookTickers` for all symbols will be returned in an array.

Filters for symbols that have this `tradingStatus`. For a single symbol, a status mismatch returns error `-1220 SYMBOL_DOES_NOT_MATCH_STATUS`. For multiple or all symbols, non-matching ones are simply excluded from the response.
